CheckTitle: Okta password policies lock accounts after 3 or fewer failed attempts
Description: **Okta Password Policy lockout threshold** should lock accounts after 3 or fewer failed attempts in every active policy.
Risk: **Loose lockout thresholds** give attackers more online guessing attempts before interruption, increasing account takeover risk.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Set the lockout threshold to 3 or fewer failed attempts in every active Okta Password Policy** while monitoring for support-impact tradeoffs.
